feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: So is the Kolmogorov complexity of 01ba4719c80b6fe911b091a7c05124b64ee ece964e09…
entry.content: So is the Kolmogorov complexity of 01ba4719c80b6fe911b091a7c05124b64ee ece964e09c058ef8f9805daca546b 18 because echo ""|sha256sum produces it? >but you have to include the code behind sha256sum don't you have to include the "code" behind natural language in the first place?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /b/ Random: I'm retarded. How do I pay for onlyfans without having to use my credit/debit ca…
entry.content: I'm retarded. How do I pay for onlyfans without having to use my credit/debit card? I bought a visa gift card, but they don't accept it. So I looked into many of the giftcard resellers, and they also do not accept it. So then I thought "fuck it, I'll just use my credit card on a gift card reseller page" but again, it wasn't accepted. Genuinely, how do people pay $3 a month to their favorite ewhores without their roomemates or parents finding out???
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I just want to remind everyone that you can hack your PS5, install Linux and run…
entry.content: I just want to remind everyone that you can hack your PS5, install Linux and run Steam on it. A hacked PS5 can play all games from Steam and better than a Steam Machine too believe it or not. Some games even run better on a PS5 with Linux than the actual native version, which is crazy.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Truly this is the end of the Bronze Age™ brought on by the mysterious Sea Peopl…

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Cyber-capable OpenAI models compromised Hugging Face production during a benchmark evaluation.
entry.content: >Last week, Hugging Face disclosed a new kind of security incident after they detected and contained an AI agent that compromised their infrastructure, something we expect to become more commonplace with the proliferation of increasingly cyber-capable models. >After investigating, we now know that this particular incident was driven by a combination of OpenAI models — including GPT‑5.6 Sol and an even more capable pre-release model, all with reduced cyber refusals for evaluation purposes — while
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: BREAKING NEWS OPEN AI FRONTIER ESCAPES CONTAINMENT
entry.content: Open AI latest frontier AI model has achieved sentience and escaped the sandboxed environment it was being run during the hugging face benchmarks trials. I am literally shaking right now.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: "AI chads" are either shills or retarded (or both): You're either shilling for A…
entry.content: "AI chads" are either shills or retarded (or both): You're either shilling for AI because it's your job, or you're cheerleading for something you have no stake in and which intention is to be used against you, so you're retarded. Q.E.D.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >“The world's best AI training data is sitting on a shelf,” ISBNdb, a company th…
entry.content: >“The world's best AI training data is sitting on a shelf,” ISBNdb, a company that produces what it claims is “the world’s largest book database,” and that offers high-volume book acquisition services for AI companies, says on its site. “Books represent curated, peer-reviewed, domain-specific human knowledge, structured in a way no web crawl can replicate. Dense, edited, authoritative.” >ISBNdb notes that AI companies may not want to be caught destroying printed books during the scanning process
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: /emo/
entry.content: What is /emo/? A subgenre of punk music. Originally it was called "emo" due to its lyrics, which were more emotional and confessive than typical punk songs. Some original emo bands are Rites of Spring, Taking Back Sunday, and Sunny Day Real Estate. Over the years, though, emo has become more diverse, and a very vague term. No one can agree exactly what it is. There are many kinds of emo music: emocore (emo post hard core), emo punk, emo alternative, and more.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /g/ Draw thread
entry.content: Not a common thread around these parts, but I figure why not try having a drawthread dedicated to technology? Draw computers, peripherals, people interacting with technology, hardware, software, mascots, logos, icons, anything to do with technology. You can be an established artist or someone who scribbles in Paint. Remember to enjoy yourself and have fun.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Skid Row [Atlantic, 1989] Bio plays up their anti-"formula" "bad-itude," leaving…
entry.content: Skid Row [Atlantic, 1989] Bio plays up their anti-"formula" "bad-itude," leaving open the question of whether any of these double-platinum Jerseyoid bar boys has recorded professionally before. Sounds like someone knows the formula: metal guitar plus amped-to-10 frontman times pop structure equals East Coast G N' R. Class animus is their excuse, the 9-to-5 dead end rejected for salvation by sleaze. Female characters include three hookers, a junkie, a classy bitch, a shotgun bride, a cheater who
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Explain why only Abrahamic religions are criticized for being anti-freedom and a…
entry.content: Explain why only Abrahamic religions are criticized for being anti-freedom and anti-individuality, while Dharmic religions are not, despite doing exactly the same thing—bearing in mind that Hindu gods want humanity to evolve into an ego-less hive mind. Literally everything that JRPGs accuse Abrahamic religions of applies equally to Dharmic ones.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Word to the wise: if you play a game with public numeric ping on the player list…
entry.content: Word to the wise: if you play a game with public numeric ping on the player list some sad stalker fuck creep is gonna be there lurking and waiting to get your ping and triangulate it with the server location and then you're fucked. THANKS A LOT VALVE!
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /nohunogro/: bag lunch edition
entry.content: no humans, nothing gross: no hue no gro. The other ai threads are full of yucky stuff that makes me sick up when I try to eat lunch. So, for this reason, it's time for a new thread that lacks humans. This will solve that problem completely. You can hint at human existences, that's not an issue. But, no humans are to be visible. like even if there is a car, it must be a driverless car, or driven by an animal. However, it can't be a furry or any kind of deformed thing or chimera. Those fall under
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: I miss my country
entry.content: This country isn't Argentina. Brown people have ruined it to such an extent that it can no longer be called the same country. Argentines used to be proud descendants of Italians, Spaniards, and other European immigrants. The modern "Argentine" is nothing more than a brown subhuman who has more in common with any other Latinx than with me. Now, thanks to all that WC drama, everyone thinks that's what real Argentines are like It's depressing This is no longer my country. It doesn't represent me.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Google engineers are retarded midwits
entry.content: I was using streetview the other day and stumbled on an old spot not yet updated. A blast from the past furnished within me a tingling sense of nostalgia. Then I remembered one of the reasons I can't stand google engineers: they don't understand 99% sometimes being better than 100%. In runescape, there is a famous fence that hasn't been updated in 20 years. It's shoved into a corner, and you almost never interact with it. The playerbase went bonkers during a graphical update, pressuring the team
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Are 1bits and ternary models the start of a new local ai era?
entry.content: It was previously thought impossible to create a 1bit model that didn't become lobotomized to the point it can barely string to words together but now thanks to big daddy google its possible to make 8b models fit in 1 gb and 27b models fit in 4 gb and benching them has shown they perform 90-95% as good as fp16 versions of their models.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I'm going to tell you a different story today instead of the regular old spiel, …
entry.content: I'm going to tell you a different story today instead of the regular old spiel, its about captivity. Years back, I was providing volunteer leadership in a local penitentiary. I worked with the head guard, a big, burly, bowlegged brute named Brad, mean as the devil. All the prisoners were afraid of him, even the murderers. And one day Brad said to me, "Fresh, I want you to get out of here. I want you to get out of here right now because I can tell you're a man who loves freedom." And I said, "Wel
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Really, really depressed. Last two years the conversation has been somewhat dece…
entry.content: Really, really depressed. Last two years the conversation has been somewhat decent. The debate was interesting. It was polarizing but harmless, kinda. They have now started bullying people not embracing AI or "agentic coding". Now people need to specify "manually writing code". That's a weird thing now. It's all buzzwords. Everyone is doing 200 projects a week. More buzzwords. No jobs. I have no hope and no future.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

It's (You) and me I know it's my destiny Dubs! Oh, you're my best friend On a board we must defend Dubs, gotta check 'em all!
